creator: jasone@canonware.com
text:
Given the significant problems with making pthread_atfork() work with
 libc_r, I am not very motivated to come up with a complete fix,
 especially since doing so would just delay the new threads library,
 which will (when complete) support pthread_atfork() correctly.  Unless
 you want to come up with a solution for pthread_atfork() in libc_r,
 I would like to close this PR.
 
 Thanks,
 Jason
